case_title: KARIMA BOGNER VS. BURLINGTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-23-2022 CONTINUED TO JAN-25-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210009687) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGNER, KARIMA AS TO DEFENDANT BURLINGTON DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-23-2022 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-22-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-31-2022
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210009687) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGNER, KARIMA
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210009687) TO PLAINTIFF BOGNER, KARIMA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-07-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE *EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES.* (TRANSACTION ID # 210027969)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-07-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-25-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
